metadata.source_authority: Minnesota Department of Revenue, Tax Research Division
metadata.source_note: Official Minnesota Department of Revenue table of inflation-adjusted statutory amounts for tax year 2026. The extracted pages publish only the second-, third-, and fourth-bracket thresholds for each filing status under Minnesota Statutes 290.06, subdivision 2c. Corpus citation us-mn/statute/290.06 remains the authority for the rate percentages, rate-schedule structure, and indexing rule. This guidance scope does not establish taxable income, tax-table substitution, alternative or net investment income taxes, credits, nonresident allocation, rounding, or final-return liability.
metadata.title: Inflation Adjusted Amounts for 2026 — Income Tax Brackets
